chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Bail Appl: No.S-318 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing. 20.02.2018. Mr. Ahsan Gul Dahri, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shahzado Saleem Nahiyoon, learned D.P.G. = A joint statement has been filed by the learned counsel for the applicant and the learned D.P.G, which is self explanatory. While keeping the practical difficulties faced by trial courts in procuring the attendance of witnesses as well as the heavy volume of cases and also the fact that this is a murder case where the accused allegedly involved has a direct role. I am not inclined to grant bail at this stage on this account. The bail application is therefore dismissed with the direction to the learned trial court to frame the charge and examine the complainant and one eye witness within 15 days of the receipt of this order. After recording the evidence of these two witnesses, the applicant will be at liberty to repeat his bail application before the learned trial Court on the ground of statutory delay as well as any new ground that may emerge after the recording of evidence of 2 witnesses as above. The learned trial Court is directed to not grant an adjournment to either side on any flimsy excuse and to use all coercive methods to procure the attendance of the complainant and an eye witness of this crime. The compliance of this order should be reported through the Additional Registrar of this Court. This bail application should not be treated as disposed of until such compliance report is received. JUDGE Fahad Memon
